<mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="0" page="1" pageWidth="1300" pageHeight="800"><root><mxCell id="0" /><mxCell id="1" parent="0" /><mxCell id="customer" value="Customer
Web / Mobile" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#08427B;strokeColor=#073B6F;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="60" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="apigw" value="API Gateway
Validates Cognito JWTs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="220" width="150" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="alb" value="ALB
Path-based routing" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="360" width="150" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="cognito" value="Amazon Cognito
JWT issuer" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="500" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="users" value="Users Service
Node.js / Fargate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="120" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="orders" value="Orders Service

Node.js / Fargate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#438DD5;strokeColor=#2E6CA4;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="460" width="160" height="70" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqsu" value="users-events
SQS" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C2185B;strokeColor=#880E4F;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="120" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="sqso" value="orders-events
SQS" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C2185B;strokeColor=#880E4F;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="290" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lamu" value="users-write-handler
Lambda" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D84315;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="770" y="120" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="lamo" value="orders-write-handler
Lambda" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D84315;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="770" y="290" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbu" value="Users DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1000" y="115" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbo" value="Orders DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1000" y="285" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="dbt" value="Tracking DB
DocumentDB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3949AB;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="1000" y="455" width="80" height="80" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="param" value="Parameter Store
Secrets" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="560" y="500" width="130" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="signoz" value="SigNoz
Observability" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#777777;strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#ffffff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="770" y="500" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c1" value="HTTPS" style="strokeColor=#08427B;fontColor=#08427B;" edge="1" parent="1" source="customer" target="apigw"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c3" value="Validates" style="strokeColor=#555555;fontColor=#444444;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apigw" target="cognito"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /></mxCell><mxCell id="c4"
